text: B7-H3 (CD276) is overexpressed in lung adenocarcinoma and correlates with poor prognosis. CD276 promotes tumor immune evasion in NSCLC.
EGFR is frequently mutated in non-small cell lung cancer. KRAS mutations are also implicated in lung adenocarcinoma resistance.
MET amplification drives resistance in NSCLC. The membrane protein CD276 is linked to melanoma progression.
MS4A1 is expressed in B cells and is a therapeutic target. This abstract discusses unrelated cardiac physiology.
